name: Austal Limited
analysis: ASB has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 50% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$4.3800, stop A$3.7026, target A$4.8400 (0.68:1) — then trail it.
